query: SELECT 'subscribers' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM newsletter_subscribers UNION ALL SELECT 'lists', COUNT(*) FROM subscriber_lists UNION ALL SELECT 'members', COUNT(*) FROM list_subscribers;
